rules: gradients permitted in marketing surfaces, never in data UI
accent amber reserved for primary CTAs
status colours keep semantic meaning even in expressive contexts
hero type may use tight tracking for impact
radius tokens only; arbitrary values are debt
marketing sections use generous vertical rhythm (64-96px)
spacing must resolve to the token scale
soft tinted shadows reinforce brand hue
CTAs may use floating elevation on hover

iconography: 24px duotone icons, rounded terminals, brand-tinted accents allowed
imagery: vivid product screenshots, illustrative gradients, expressive lifestyle photography in marketing surfaces
content_tone: warm, benefit-led, second person, active voice, momentum-oriented; one CTA per section
motion_character: expressive but purposeful; 200-320ms spring transitions, entrance reveals on scroll, hover delight on CTAs, all gated behind prefers-reduced-motion
confirmation_patterns: celebratory toast on conversion or signup completion
inline success state with momentum cue for form submission
modal confirmation reserved for cancellation or downgrade
error_patterns: friendly inline validation with corrective guidance
non-blocking banner with retry for recoverable errors
preserve input and never blame the user in copy
navigation_patterns: sticky top navigation with prominent primary CTA
anchored in-page navigation on long marketing pages
accessibility_posture: WCAG 2.2 AA; motion and parallax honour prefers-reduced-motion, CTA contrast 4.5:1, focus visible, captions on hero video
performance_posture: LCP under 2.5s on marketing pages; lazy-load below-fold media, responsive images, defer non-critical animation libs, JS budget 150KB above the fold

framework_conventions.styling: Tailwind with token-mapped theme, motion via Framer Motion
rules: animation libraries dynamically imported below the fold
no arbitrary bracket values; extend the theme instead

component_conventions.hero: headline, subhead, single primary CTA, optional gradient backdrop
component_conventions.pricing_card: tier name, price with tabular figure, feature list, one CTA, highlighted recommended tier
component_conventions.cta_button: accent fill, hover elevation, motion gated by reduced-motion
rules: one canonical CTA component; variants must be sanctioned
particle and parallax effects disabled on mobile and reduced-motion

exceptions.reason: flagship launch microsite with bespoke performance budget and art direction
